headline: Elon Musk Says He Wants to Get SpaceX IPO Underway ‘Pretty Soon’
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Elon Musk said he’s back in Texas working on plans for an initial public offering of SpaceX as the rocket and artificial intelligence company gears up for the largest listing of all time.
